WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ym.CustomerID,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM 
    customers c
  JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE 
    ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
  GROUP BY 
    c.Segment, ym.CustomerID
),
min_consumption AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    CustomerID,
    total_consumption,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption ASC) AS rn
  FROM 
    filtered_data
),
lowest_consumers AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    SUM(total_consumption) AS total_lowest,
    COUNT(*) AS num_lowest
  FROM 
    min_consumption
  WHERE 
    rn = 1
  GROUP BY 
    Segment
),
annual_averages AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    total_lowest / num_lowest AS annual_avg
  FROM 
    lowest_consumers
)
SELECT
  (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_averages WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_averages WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS sme_lam_diff,
  (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_averages WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_averages WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS lam_kam_diff,
  (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_averages WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_averages WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS kam_sme_diff
FROM
  annual_averages
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
